message:
fix(engine): sync concurrent agent fixes — comment detection, governance, risk, versioning

ambient_authority.rs:
  Simplify comment detection: starts_with("//") already matches "///" and
  "//!" prefixes, so the redundant disjuncts are removed.

governance_mechanism.rs:
  - reinstate_quarantine(): Validate quarantine is Active before lifting;
    return ReinstateNotAllowed error for non-Active status or missing quarantine
  - compute_ic_score(): Fix incentive compatibility scoring: handle
    false_report_loss <= 0 as perfect IC (1M), truthful_gain <= 0 as zero IC,
    and use net_gain/truthful_gain ratio for mixed cases (previous formula
    could divide by 1 and produce wrong scale)

hybrid_lane_router.rs:
  - Bound latency buffer to 1000 entries to prevent unbounded memory growth
    in long-running sessions
  - Fix regret computation: use total lane pulls (sum of lane_pulls values)
    instead of latency buffer length, which can differ after the buffer
    cap was added

franken-extension-host/src/lib.rs:
  Include patch version in engine version comparison: extensions requesting
  a newer patch version than supported are now correctly rejected (previously
  only major.minor were compared)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
